title: polycarpon prostratum var. prostratum
intro: Polycarpon prostratum var. prostratum, also known as creeping polycarpon or prostrate polycarpon, is a perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Polycarpon prostratum var. prostratum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
